description_long: This object is a small, round cactus with a vibrant green body, segmented into vertical ridges and adorned with several sharp white spines. The cactus is topped with a few pink daisy-like flowers, adding a touch of color and visual interest. It is planted in a faceted, polygonal terracotta pot filled with dark brown soil, giving it a sturdy and earthy appearance. The pot has a simple, unadorned design, emphasizing the natural beauty of the plant. The overall look is clean and stylized, making it suitable for both modern and traditional urban environments. The cactus appears healthy and well-maintained, ideal for decorative use in homes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A small, green cactus with pink flowers sits in a faceted terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The pot is plain and unadorned, highlighting the cactus's vibrant color and spiky texture.
description_view_0: The cactus is seen with two pink flowers visible on the upper right, and several white spines along the ridges, with the faceted terracotta pot clearly shown.
description_view_1: This view highlights two pink flowers on top of the cactus, both fully visible, and shows the pot's polygonal shape from a slightly different angle.
description_view_2: Only one pink flower is visible on the left side of the cactus, with the spines and the dark soil in the pot clearly seen.
description_view_3: The back of the cactus is shown, with no flowers visible and the spines more prominent, while the pot's faceted design remains consistent.
